# tree_root (Resource)

Root resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the root.

### Optional

- `colors` (List of String) Root's colors.
- `configurable_attribute` (String) Root's configurable attribute
- `defaulted` (String) Root's configurable attribute with default value

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The root's identifier
